basic_details.job_title: TIFR Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) Administrative Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tifr.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TIFR Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: As per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 60% marks, Diploma/Degree/Certificate
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 60% marks. Diploma/Degree/Certificate course in Management or Administration from a recognised University/Institute. Proficiency in use of personal computers and applications. 5 years' service at Level 6 and /or Level 7 and /or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emolument).

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TIFR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
